How it works

Pick your drink
Choose from hand-drawn doodles — cocktails, coffee, champagne, and more.

Type your number, your win, your flex. Add your handle.

Download your card and post it. Watch the likes roll in.

Made by a maker, for makers

I started drawing drink doodles to celebrate my own X milestones. Every 100 followers, I'd pick a new drink and sketch it on my iPad.

People kept commenting "best way to celebrate a milestone" and "I wish I could draw like that" — so I built ToastIT to let everyone toast their wins.

Every drink is hand-drawn between nap times and night feeds (new mom life). No AI art, no stock templates. Just me, my Apple Pencil, and way too much iced coffee.

@sushbuilds on X →

Frequently asked questions

Is ToastIT free?

Yes! The free plan gives you 5 drinks and 5 card exports with a small ToastIT watermark. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited exports, no watermark, and new drinks every week.

What do I get with Pro?

Unlimited card exports, no watermark, new hand-drawn drinks every week, request custom drinks, and a spot on the Toasters wall. Launch pricing: $5/mo or $48/year (save 20%).

How is this different from Canva?

Canva gives you a blank canvas. ToastIT gives you hand-drawn drink doodles paired with your milestone — done in 10 seconds, not 10 minutes. Every doodle is drawn by a real human, not AI.

Can I request a custom drink?

Yes! Pro users can suggest drinks and vote on what gets drawn next. Every doodle is hand-drawn on an iPad by our founder.

Who draws the doodles?

Every single drink is hand-drawn on an iPad by @sushbuilds. No AI, no stock art. New drinks added weekly for Pro members.

Do I need design skills?

Nope. Pick a drink, type your milestone, download. The doodles do the heavy lifting.
